goal: Establish foundational infrastructure and ML pipeline for NBA prediction model

stories.title: Which NBA stats features yield best XGBoost accuracy
deliverables: Feature importance analysis documented in decisions.md with top 10 features ranked
Recommendation includes feature set with pros/cons and expected accuracy impact
Prototype training script tests at least 3 different feature combinations

stories.title: Pre-market vs post-line-release prediction timing
deliverables: Decision documented in decisions.md with timing recommendation
Trade-off analysis includes data freshness, line availability, and user value
Cron schedule recommendation for daily pipeline execution

stories.title: Next.js 15 project setup
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 15 project initializes and runs without errors
ESLint and Prettier configured with project standards
Folder structure matches architecture.md

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js 15 project with App Router and TypeScript
acceptanceCriteria: next dev starts without errors
TypeScript strict mode enabled in tsconfig.json
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use create-next-app with --ts and --app flags

tasks.title: Configure ESLint and Prettier with project standards
acceptanceCriteria: npm run lint passes with zero warnings
Prettier formats all files consistently
tasks.notesForBuilder: Extend next/core-web-vitals ESLint config

tasks.title: Create project folder structure per architecture.md
acceptanceCriteria: All directories from architecture.md exist
Each directory contains an index.ts barrel export
tasks.notesForBuilder: Reference architecture.md for exact directory names

stories.title: Firebase Firestore configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Firebase project created and credentials stored securely
Firestore SDK initialized with typed collection schemas
Security rules deployed and validated

tasks.title: Create Firebase project and configure credentials
acceptanceCriteria: Firebase config stored in environment variables
No credentials committed to repository
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use Firebase console to create project, store config in .env.local

tasks.title: Initialize Firestore SDK and create collection schemas
acceptanceCriteria: Firestore client connects successfully
TypeScript interfaces defined for all collections
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use Firebase v9 modular SDK imports

tasks.title: Configure Firestore security rules
acceptanceCriteria: Security rules deployed to Firebase
Rules tested with Firebase emulator
tasks.notesForBuilder: Default deny all, then allow specific paths

stories.title: Python ML pipeline project setup
acceptanceCriteria: Python virtual environment created with all dependencies
Pipeline folder structure matches design
pytest and mypy configured and passing

tasks.title: Create Python virtual environment and install dependencies
acceptanceCriteria: Virtual environment activates without errors
All dependencies in requirements.txt install successfully
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use uv or venv for environment creation

tasks.title: Create pipeline folder structure and placeholder files
acceptanceCriteria: All pipeline directories exist with __init__.py files
Placeholder modules importable without errors
tasks.notesForBuilder: Include ingestion, features, training, and prediction directories

tasks.title: Configure pytest and mypy for Python testing
acceptanceCriteria: pytest discovers and runs placeholder tests
mypy passes with strict mode enabled
tasks.notesForBuilder: Configure both tools in pyproject.toml

stories.title: NBA Stats API data ingestion
acceptanceCriteria: NBA API client fetches data with rate limiting
Team stats for current season stored as Parquet files
Ingestion pipeline runs end-to-end without errors

tasks.title: Implement NBA API client wrapper with rate limiting
acceptanceCriteria: Client respects NBA API rate limits
Retry logic handles transient failures
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use nba_api library, add 0.6s delay between requests

tasks.title: Implement team stats fetching for current season
acceptanceCriteria: Fetches stats for all 30 NBA teams
Returns typed DataFrame with expected columns
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use LeagueStandings and TeamGameLog endpoints

tasks.title: Implement Parquet file storage for training data
acceptanceCriteria: Data saved as Parquet with snappy compression
File partitioned by season
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use pyarrow for Parquet I/O

stories.title: XGBoost model training pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Feature engineering pipeline transforms raw stats into model features
XGBoost model trains with cross-validation and logs metrics
Predictions generated and written to Firestore

tasks.title: Implement feature engineering pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Transforms raw stats into feature matrix
Handles missing values without data leakage
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use sklearn Pipeline for reproducibility

tasks.title: Implement XGBoost model training with cross-validation
acceptanceCriteria: 5-fold cross-validation logs accuracy per fold
Best hyperparameters saved to model config
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use xgboost.cv for cross-validation, log with MLflow or print

tasks.title: Implement prediction generation for today's games
acceptanceCriteria: Predictions generated for all games on the schedule
Output includes win probability and confidence score
tasks.notesForBuilder: Fetch today's schedule from ScoreboardV2 endpoint

tasks.title: Implement Firestore write for predictions
acceptanceCriteria: Predictions written to Firestore predictions collection
Each document keyed by game date and matchup
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use firebase-admin SDK, batch writes for atomicity

stories.title: View today's game predictions on dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays all games scheduled for today
Each game card shows teams, win probability, and confidence
Data refreshes automatically when new predictions are available

tasks.title: Create predictions API route to fetch from Firestore
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/predictions returns today's predictions as JSON
Response includes proper error handling and status codes
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use Next.js Route Handlers with Firebase Admin SDK

tasks.title: Build game prediction card component
acceptanceCriteria: Card displays team logos, names, and win probability bar
Confidence badge shows Low/Medium/High based on score
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use Tailwind v4 for styling, keep component stateless

tasks.title: Assemble dashboard page with prediction cards grid
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page renders grid of prediction cards
Loading and empty states handled gracefully
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use React Suspense for loading state

stories.title: NBA API client crashes on timeout during team stats fetch
stories.whatsBroken: NBA API client throws unhandled exception when request times out after 30s
stories.expected: Client retries the request up to 3 times with exponential backoff, then raises a typed NbaApiTimeoutError
stories.actual: Unhandled requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout propagates to pipeline runner and crashes the entire ingestion job
reproduce: Run pipeline/ingestion/nba_client.py with network throttled to 1kbps
acceptanceCriteria: Timeout errors caught and retried with exponential backoff
NbaApiTimeoutError raised after max retries exhausted
Pipeline logs warning on each retry attempt

tasks.title: Add retry logic with exponential backoff to NBA API client
acceptanceCriteria: Client retries up to 3 times on timeout
Backoff delays are 1s, 2s, 4s
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use tenacity library or manual retry loop

tasks.title: Create NbaApiTimeoutError custom exception
acceptanceCriteria: Custom exception includes original timeout details
Exception is importable from pipeline.exceptions
tasks.notesForBuilder: Inherit from base PipelineError

tasks.title: Add retry logging and tests for timeout handling
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests mock timeout and verify retry count
Log output includes retry attempt number and delay
tasks.notesForBuilder: Use unittest.mock to simulate ReadTimeout
